xBRIEFInfo.author: agent:cursor
xBRIEFInfo.description: Scope xBRIEF for committing orphaned completed-xBRIEF lifecycle records

narratives.Overview: Several completed-xBRIEF lifecycle records were produced by `deft scope:complete` and are sitting untracked in the main checkout because direct commits to the protected `main` branch are disabled. Land them via a tiny housekeeping PR so the completed-work history is tracked. This is pure `xbrief/` metadata — no source, engine, or config changes.
narratives.Requirements: FR-1: Commit the orphaned completed-xBRIEF records (`xbrief/completed/2026-07-23-strum-chord-mode.xbrief.json`, `xbrief/completed/2026-07-23-deploy-chords-to-fly.xbrief.json`, and this brief's own completion record) via a PR against `main`. FR-2: Stage ONLY `xbrief/` metadata — nothing from `.deft/core/`, no source, no `next-env.d.ts`. FR-3: Merge on green required checks; leave the main checkout clean with no leftover untracked completed-xBRIEF duplicates. NFR-1: Must not trip `no-mixed-core-and-app` (xbrief/ is app-side, not core).
narratives.Assumptions: A-1: The untracked records already exist in the operator's main checkout at known absolute paths and are valid. A-2: Repo merge convention is a merge commit; only `no-mixed-core-and-app` is required (SLizard advisory).

items.title: Open + merge a housekeeping PR committing the orphaned completed-xBRIEF records; leave main checkout clean
